# Sample test document

This is a placeholder text file used to test chunking and retrieval logic
in CI without requiring a real PDF parser. Replace with a real PDF if you
need layout-aware parsing tests.

The turbofan engine is composed of:
- a low-pressure compressor
- a high-pressure compressor
- a combustion chamber
- a high-pressure turbine
- a low-pressure turbine

The CMAPSS dataset provides run-to-failure sensor readings.
